prismShift.heading: Compute at the edge where data is born

facets.title: Self-healing device mesh
facets.description: Millions of sensors, actuators, and gateways form adaptive clusters — auto-discovering neighbors, rerouting around failures, and maintaining quorum without cloud dependency.
facets.alt: Network of connected IoT devices in an industrial setting

facets.title: Sub-5ms fog computing
facets.description: Process sensor streams at the network edge in under 5 milliseconds — filtering noise, aggregating events, and triggering actuators before data ever leaves the facility.
facets.alt: Edge computing nodes processing data locally

facets.title: Real-time stream intelligence
facets.description: Apache-grade stream processing with built-in ML inference — detecting anomalies, classifying events, and enriching payloads as they flow through the pipeline.
facets.alt: Real-time data stream visualization on monitors

facets.title: Edge-native digital twins
facets.description: Mirror physical assets locally with lightweight twin runtimes — simulate what-if scenarios and predict failures without round-tripping to centralized cloud infrastructure.
facets.alt: Digital twin dashboard for industrial equipment

facets.title: Zero-trust edge security
facets.description: Every device, packet, and API call is authenticated and encrypted — with micro-segmentation policies that contain breaches before they propagate across the mesh.
facets.alt: Cybersecurity shield protecting edge network infrastructure

facets.title: Predictive maintenance at the edge
facets.description: On-device models analyze vibration, temperature, and acoustic signatures — scheduling maintenance before failures occur and reducing unplanned downtime by up to 70%.
